chunks.text: Technical Reports - Doug Tygar. Compromising PCA-based Anomaly Detectors for Network-Wide Traffic (EECS-2008-73) by Benjamin I. P. Rubinstein, Blaine Nelson, Ling Huang, Anthony D. Joseph, Shing-hon Lau, Nina Taft and Doug Tygar.

Lobaton, Marci Lenore Meingast, Songhwai Oh, Simon Wang, Posu Yan, Allen Yang, Chuohao Yeo, Lung-Chung Chang, Doug Tygar and S. Shankar Sastry.

Locked cookies: Web authentication security against phishing, pharming, and active attacks (EECS-2007-25) by Chris K. Karlof, Umesh Shankar, Doug Tygar and David Wagner.
